TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Bucky_Bockhorn, title = Bucky_Bockhorn, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bucky_Bockhorn} }

S.FORM: Bucky Bockhorn nalecuhan i Campbell Hill, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bucky Bockhorn i 1958 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 17, namapili' tu nu Cincinnati Royals putiput. 7 bulad 8 demiad, 1933 a mihca, Bucky Bockhorn, miunduay.
S.PHON: bu ¶kj bo ¶kƒßorn nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ¶ampb…ôr~…ær~…æ ƒßir~…ær~…æ, ir~…ær~…æinois, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. bu ¶kj bo ¶kƒßorn i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶in ¶innati *ojar~…æs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, bu ¶kj bo ¶kƒßorn, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bucky Bockhorn nalecuhan i Campbell Hill, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bucky Bockhorn i 1958 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 17, namapili' tu nu Cincinnati Royals putiput. 7 bulad 8 demiad, 1933 a mihca, Bucky Bockhorn, miunduay.
